title: A look at the nonprofit Current AI, backed by $400M in commitments from many partners including $100M from France, that's funding open, public AI infrastructure (Kate Park/TechCrunch)
summary:
Kate Park / TechCrunch:
A look at the nonprofit Current AI, backed by $400M in commitments from many partners including $100M from France, that's funding open, public AI infrastructure  —  A farmer in rural India takes a photo of a dying plant.  She wants to research it on the internet but she doesn't speak English.
